## What

<!--
The desired endpoint or behavior, concretely: method + path (e.g.
GET /api/v1/audit-log), or the user-visible flow. Vague asks stall.
-->

## Why

<!--
The value — what it unblocks or the defect it closes. Link the cascade if it
chains (see ADR 0001 for an example of why a missing endpoint matters).
-->

## Acceptance

<!--
Observable, checkable conditions. Per CLAUDE.md, a new endpoint ships with
1 unit + 1 integration + 1 e2e test — list the tests that must exist.
